code.parse_mode_reason: Requested 2D physics subset pass; 3D lifting is forbidden for this run.

readme_task_contract.summary: Grid decision replay; purple agent is dynamic, goal/doors/blocked cells are context.

attached_instructions.text:
On each step, the player can move up, down, left, right, or stay in place. They cannot move through walls. If they reach the star before time runs out, then they win.

Above, you can watch the player move and see that they won this time! (Please wait to see the animation.)

config_metadata.experimentName: That was close! A counterfactual simulation model of causal judgments about decisions (Exp 1)
config_metadata.description: You will view grid scenarios and judge how likely a player would win if they took a specified path, before seeing what actually happened.
